case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIF. vs. GORMAN, ROBERT H. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIF. SERVED MAR-10-1995, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GORMAN, ROBERT H.
APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIF.

DEPT 7. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M. NORMAN. CLERK:G.SHULL C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL, DFT APPEARING IN PRO-PER; ALL PRESENT. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. EXHIBIT RETAINED BY COURT. PLTF SUBMITTED PROPOSED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORMAN, ROBERT H. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1200 GOUGH STREET #23-B, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $26.66 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26.66, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $44.17 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORP. OF CALIF.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GORMAN, ROBERT H.
